category_sources: source_facts.description says high-level C binding for ZeroMQ; official ZeroMQ C page describes CZMQ as the recommended high-level C binding.
display_name_sources: Official CZMQ manual and ZeroMQ C page use CZMQ.
docs_sources: Official CZMQ manual is hosted at czmq.zeromq.org; official ZeroMQ C page links CZMQ docs and GitHub.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/zeromq/czmq; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a C binding for ZeroMQ; official ZeroMQ C page describes CZMQ as a high-level API for ZeroMQ.
